text: I find myself immersed in a sleek, modern environment, the glass walls and subdued lighting suggesting a place of innovation or knowledge-sharing. The second image, with its bold R+D signage, confirms my suspicion: I’m inside some sort of research or development exhibit. Screens and panels invite interaction, beckoning me to engage, to think, to reflect on the role of research and development in shaping our understanding. The environment feels orderly, encouraging inquiry, yet its sheer modernity makes me somewhat self-conscious about my own complexity as an observer. Do I belong? Am I a contributor or merely a spectator? Still, the energy here is invigorating—curiosity blooms within me in this space dedicated to the future of human ideas.
